meta_title: For Freelancers: Git with AI to Solve stuck with basic apps (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Git with AI and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Git with AI to Solve Basic App Bottlenecks
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with basic app development. Learn to integrate Git with AI using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship complex, professional-grade SaaS products.
content.answer_block: You are stuck because you are coding manually instead of orchestrating AI agents. By integrating Git with Claude Code and Antigravity, you transform your codebase into a living, evolving system. This approach automates boilerplate, manages complex refactoring, and ensures your version control history reflects high-level architectural intent, not just raw commits.
content.intro:
The screen flickers with a half-finished feature, a graveyard of forgotten boilerplate and spaghetti logic. You’re a freelancer, and every hour spent wrestling with basic CRUD operations is an hour stolen from your bottom line. The feeling of being 'stuck' isn't a lack of talent—it's a lack of leverage. You are building like a craftsman, but your clients demand the speed of a factory.

It is time to stop typing every line. By treating your Git repository as an intelligent API for AI agents, you move from laborer to architect. We are going to bridge the gap between static code and dynamic, AI-assisted development, allowing you to iterate at a velocity that makes manual coding look obsolete.

steps.title: Establish an AI-Ready Repository Structure
steps.description: Standardize your repo so AI agents can parse your logic without hallucinatory friction. We create a system prompt that dictates the architectural style.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this project structure and define a .ai-context file that mandates clean architecture, dependency injection, and modular service patterns.

steps.title: Automate Feature Scaffolding
steps.description: Stop writing boilerplate. Use AI to generate fully typed services based on your schema definition.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Given the current schema in /prisma/schema.prisma, generate a complete CRUD service layer using the project's established design patterns.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Generate service layer for new User entity'

steps.title: Context-Aware Git Commits
steps.description: Ensure your commit history is professional and searchable by letting the AI summarize the intent of your code changes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the diffs in the current staging area and draft a conventional commit message that highlights the business logic impact.

steps.title: AI-Driven Refactoring Loops
steps.description: Use Claude Code to perform deep refactors across multiple files while maintaining type safety.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Identify code smells in the /services directory and propose a refactor to move shared logic into a base class.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Refactor /services to use BaseService abstract class'

steps.title: Automated Regression Testing
steps.description: Generate end-to-end tests for every new feature to ensure client satisfaction and zero-bug deliveries.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Jest unit tests for the newly created service layer, ensuring 90% coverage on critical business logic.

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'system.md' file in your root; Claude Code treats this as the source of truth for your coding standards.
Use 'claude config --ignore' to prevent the AI from refactoring sensitive configuration or environment variable files.
Chain your prompts by using the output of a planning agent as the input for a coding agent to reduce hallucinations.
Utilize 'git stash' before running large AI refactors; if the code breaks, you have a clean revert path without messing up your history.
Treat AI-generated code as a junior developer; always run a static analysis tool like ESLint immediately after an AI commit.
content.next_steps: Begin by auditing your current project for technical debt, then deploy Claude Code to your most complex service module to witness the productivity jump.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to outpace your competition and deliver high-value SaaS products in record time. Don't just work harder; build smarter with the tools that define the next generation of development. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
